lines: Listen closely, {player}. What sound does the 'B' make?
Sounds are the music of words! Let's sing them together.
The ocean has so many beautiful sounds, {player}.
no_quest_line: You have a great ear for sounds, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm trying to match these sounds to their letters. Can you help me, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Listen... do you hear that? You're doing great, {player}!
quest_complete_line: That's exactly right! You've got a wonderful ear for sounds, {player}.
